ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "numerical_size" TEXT /* Numerical size (e.g., 0-2, 4-6, 8-10) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length for the size */,
  "across_shoulder" TEXT /* Across shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "height" REAL /* Height range for the size */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., slim, regular, relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product is available in */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_size_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the size profile belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size profile is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the customer fits into */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_profiles_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_profiles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city of the order */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state of the order */,
  "shipping_zip_code" TEXT /* Shipping zip code of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
